name: Amazon DocumentDB DBCluster
description: Schema representing an Amazon DocumentDB database cluster, which is a managed MongoDB-compatible document database cluster consisting of one or more instances connected to a shared storage volume.

DBClusterIdentifier.description: The user-supplied DB cluster identifier. This identifier is the unique key that identifies a DB cluster.

DBClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB cluster.

Status.description: Specifies the current state of this DB cluster.

Engine.description: The name of the database engine to be used for this DB cluster.

Endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the primary instance of the DB cluster.

ReaderEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for the DB cluster. The reader endpoint load-balances connections across the read replicas.

Port.description: Specifies the port that the database engine is listening on.

MasterUsername.description: Contains the master username for the DB cluster.

DBSubnetGroup.description: Specifies information on the subnet group associated with the DB cluster.

StorageEncrypted.description: Specifies whether the DB cluster is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: If StorageEncrypted is true, the AWS KMS key identifier for the encrypted DB cluster.

BackupRetentionPeriod.description: Specifies the number of days for which automatic DB snapshots are retained.

PreferredBackupWindow.description: Specifies the daily time range during which automated backups are created.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: Specifies the weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur.

ClusterCreateTime.description: Specifies the time when the DB cluster was created, in Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).

DBClusterMembers.description: Provides the list of instances that make up the DB cluster.

DBInstanceIdentifier.description: Specifies the instance identifier for this member of the DB cluster.

IsClusterWriter.description: A value that is true if the cluster member is the primary instance for the DB cluster.

DBClusterParameterGroupStatus.description: Specifies the status of the DB cluster parameter group for this member.

PromotionTier.description: A value that specifies the order in which a read replica is promoted to the primary instance.

VpcSecurityGroups.description: Provides a list of VPC security groups that the DB cluster belongs to.

DeletionProtection.description: Specifies whether this cluster can be deleted. If DeletionProtection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted unless it is modified and DeletionProtection is disabled.

EnabledCloudwatchLogsExports.description: A list of log types that this DB cluster is configured to export to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.
